class.name: ResonanceAmbisonicPlayer
class.brief_description: Higher-order Ambisonics player with HRTF decode. Uses ResonanceAmbisonicInternalStream.
class.description: ResonanceAmbisonicPlayer plays Ambisonic audio streams through Steam Audio's binaural decoder. Assign a [ResonanceAmbisonicInternalStream] to the [member stream] property. Supports first-order (4 channels), second-order (9 channels), and third-order (16 channels) Ambisonics. When [member rotation_enabled] is true, the listener orientation is applied to decode (world-relative). Disable for fixed/world-space decode.

members.member: Apply listener orientation to Ambisonics decode. When false, decode is fixed in world space.
